name: Form: Add Field

description.en: Add an input field to an existing form.
description.de: Ein Eingabefeld zu einem bestehenden Formular hinzufügen.

bot: Call form-get first to read the current definition. Then use this warp to add a new field.

actions.prompt:
Generate the HTTP PATCH body as valid JSON for adding a field to a form. Return ONLY the raw JSON object — no markdown fences, no explanation.

The current form definition is:
{{currentDefinition}}

Append a new field to definition.actions[0].inputs using this exact schema:
{"name":"<display label>","as":"<camelCaseKey>","description":{"en":"...","de":"..."},"type":"{{fieldType}}","source":"field","required":{{required}}}

Return the full updated definition:
{"definition":{...full current definition with the new field appended to actions[0].inputs...}}

Rules:
- Preserve all existing fields exactly — do not modify anything else
- Derive the `as` key from the field name in camelCase
- Write a concise description in both English and German
- `required` must be a boolean (true or false), not a string

description.en: Label shown to the user (e.g. Email Address)
Input type: string, email, phone, number, textarea, date, or checkbox
description.de: Eingabetyp: string, email, phone, number, textarea, date oder checkbox

description.en: Is this field required? (true or false)
description.de: Ist dieses Feld ein Pflichtfeld? (true oder false)

inputs.name: Current Definition
inputs.bot: The full current form definition JSON string. Fetch it from form-get and pass it here verbatim.

inputs.name: Form ID
inputs.bot: The form's hash ID. Carry it from context — never ask the user.
